'''Han Dardell Thorpe''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] head [[Pilot|pilot]] of the famed [[Galaxy|galactic]] [[Cruiser|cruiser]] ''[[Tarnack]]''. They were the [[Parent|father]] of [[Chuiee Two Thorpe]], the [[Padawan|padawaan]] of [[Jedi-Bendu]] [[Mace Windy]].<ref name="Making of" />

==Behind the scenes==
Han Dardell Thorpe was mentioned in a<ref name="Making of" /> [[1973]]<ref name="Year by Year">''[[Star Wars Year By Year: A Visual History, New Edition]]''</ref> two-page outline for the film that would become {{Film|IV}}, titled [[Journal of the Whills, Part I|''Journal of the Whills (Part) I'']]. [[Han Solo]], a character in the final version of ''A New Hope'', shares his first name with Thorpe.<ref name="Making of" />
